title: Meaty Netherrack
description: A meaty vein take towards netherrack
body:
![Image of the common blocks found in the nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c50382f6d4e8e8296d9254ba05af4f649bccf3f.png)
I was making a texture for netherrack for a pack that I sometimes work on but I realized it kind of also works as a alternate texture for Jappa's netherrack so I made this resource pack enjoy!
